credits

  • music player done using youtube's iframe API
  • dynamic calendar code from designfreaks
  • draggable js code from stackoverflow
  • blank bookmark from foollovers.com
  • cute memo scans by kawaiiscans
  • pencil cursor from whimsical
  • weather icons from tora7.ciao.jp
  • iframe links script from melonking
  • fonts used: gaegu, spirit, morningtea

any replies or comments are welcome on my e-mail or :3
